# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure AD Tenant ID"
      }
    },
    "appServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the primary application service principal"
      }
    },
    "devTeamGroupObjectId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the development team Azure AD group"
      }
    },
    "ciCdServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the CI/CD pipeline service principal"
      }
    },
    "backendServicePrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Object ID of the backend service principal"
      }
    },
    "enableSoftDelete": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "softDeleteRetentionInDays": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 90
    },
    "enablePurgeProtection": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "networkAclDefaultAction": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Deny",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Allow",
        "Deny"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Default action for network ACLs"
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the Key Vault"
      }
    },
    "allowedIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "List of IP addresses or CIDR ranges allowed to access the Key Vault"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "copy": [
      {
        "name": "virtualNetworkRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]",
        "input": {
          "id": "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('virtualNetworkRules')]]",
          "ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint": false
        }
      },
      {
        "name": "ipRules",
        "count": "[length(parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]",
        "input": {
          "value": "[parameters('allowedIpRanges')[copyIndex('ipRules')]]"
        }
      }
    ],
    "secretsReadListPermissions": [
      "get",
      "list"
    ],
    "secretsManagePermissions": [
      "get",
      "list",
      "set",
      "delete",
      "recover",
      "backup",
      "restore"
    ]
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "enableSoftDelete": "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]",
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]",
        "enablePurgeProtection": "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]",
        "enableRbacAuthorization": false,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "[parameters('networkAclDefaultAction')]",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('virtualNetworkRules')]",
          "ipRules": "[variables('ipRules')]"
        },
        "accessPolicies": [
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('backendServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('ciCdServicePrincipalId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsManagePermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          },
          {
            "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
            "objectId": "[parameters('devTeamGroupObjectId')]",
            "permissions": {
              "secrets": "[variables('secretsReadListPermissions')]",
              "keys": [],
              "certificates": []
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/', 'auditLogs')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "AuditEvent",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ],
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "AllMetrics",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    },
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    },
    "securityNotes": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "IMPORTANT: Each principal is granted only the minimum permissions needed for its role. Application service principals have read/list only. Only the CI/CD principal has write access for secret rotation. Network ACLs default to Deny. Review and adjust allowedSubnetResourceIds and allowedIpRanges for your environment. Enable RBAC authorization (enableRbacAuthorization=true) for more granular control in production. Audit logging is enabled via diagnostic settings."
    }
  }
}
